text:
Once upon a time in a sleepy town.

There lived a girl named Dawn. Every day Dawn would wake up and think how utterly beautiful dawn was.

But then.

One summer she decided to go to Madrid.

She liked those who spoke Spanish.

She took Spanish lessons.

She loved bullfighting.

She met a man named Diego.

They fell hard for each other.

He taught her about bulls.

She taught him about owls.

They bird-watched all their days.

Now they live together.

They love going bird-walking.

They never speak Spanish.

They speak just owl.

And that is all they ever say.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
